root.sql:
SELECT sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.membership_no ,tab.seq_no) as rowno, tab.* FROM ( select decode(lag(sc_mem_surminar.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_surminar.membership_no,sc_mem_surminar.seq_no) ,sc_mem_surminar.membership_no,0,1) as row_memno, sc_mem_surminar.membership_no, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),1,30) as age_life_text , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as member_group_name, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_line(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,'0') as address, --ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, '0') as telephone, sc_mem_surminar.seq_no, sc_mem_surminar.operate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_surminar.operate , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as operate_tdate, sc_mem_surminar.remark
,( select max( to_number(to_char( sc_mem_surminar.operate ,'yyyy')))+543 from sc_mem_surminar where sc_mem_surminar.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as max_year
,( select count(sc_mem_surminar.seq_no) from sc_mem_surminar where sc_mem_surminar.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as frequency
from sc_mem_surminar, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_surminar.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_surminar.operate between '01/01/2023' and '10/01/2024' --and sc_mem_surminar.membership_no = '00003' order by sc_mem_surminar.operate, sc_mem_surminar.membership_no, sc_mem_surminar.seq_no )tab
